flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Sullivan University fell 25% between 2006 and 2009 (89.0% → 66.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sullivan University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.5k → $15.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Sullivan University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.5k → $15.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Sullivan University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 2.0k).
